summary: Landed the T015 run orchestration boundary by moving managed start identity, duplicate detection, readiness, marker env injection, and run-index writes out of src/cli.js and into src/control-plane/runs.js. Project repair now validates replacement paths/config before registry mutation.
review_fixes: Created src/control-plane/runs.js as the run index and managed start orchestration owner.
Coordinated start/remove and duplicate-start/run-index mutation with daemonless project and task locks, released after readiness transition.
Removed direct run-index writes, run id creation, marker env injection, duplicate-start checks, and readiness polling from src/cli.js.
Validated project repair --path/--config by loading the target config before registry updates.
